title: Design the agent control loop
description: Define the perceive-decide-act cycle, its terminal conditions, step cap, and no-progress guard before adding tools.
body: Steps: 1. Define each iteration: gather observations, decide an action, execute, record the result. 2. Enumerate terminal conditions (goal met, cap reached, no progress, fatal error). 3. Set the step cap and the at-cap behavior. 4. Add the no-progress signature check across a window. 5. Add tests for convergence, cap-hit, and stall. Rollback point: before enabling side-effecting tools in the loop. Validation: a non-converging task halts at the cap and a repeating task halts on the no-progress guard.
